---
# Member parameters
title: Frank Fischer
academic_title: Prof Dr.
name: Frank Fischer
first_name: Frank
surname: Fischer
categories:
  - Psychology & Education

memberships:
  - type: lmu-individual
    status: active
    position: Director of the Munich Center of the Learning Sciences
    faculty: Psychology & Education

photo: "images/fischer_frank.jpg"
email: frank.fischer@psy.lmu.de

links:
  - label: "LMU Profile"
    url: "https://www.lmu.de/psy/en/persons/contact-page/frank-fischer-607c6126.htmll"

# Social media links - variable number
social_media:
  ORCID: "https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0253-659X"

# Mission statement paragraphs - variable number
mission_statement: |
  I am Professor of Education and Educational Psychology and the speaker of the DFG-funded Collaborative Research Centre SHARP (Simulation-Based Learning in Higher Education. Advancing Research on Process Diagnostics and Personalized Interventions, TRR419). Through my leadership, I am committed to fostering openness, rigor, and reproducibility in research at SHARP and beyond. I look forward to closely collaborating with the LMU Open Science Center. For instance, I encourage our PhD candidates and postdocs to take part in the OSC’s training programs. The research groups at our Chair will benefit greatly from consultations.

# Research interests - variable number
research_interests:


# Publications - variable number
publications:


# these must be included always.
template: templates/people-template.html
filters: 
    - templates/people_filter.lua
---
